languages.text: "У веры в Него тысяча ликов. Ваш таков. Просто не все считают, что Богу-Императору можно поклоняться по-разному".
"Faith in Him has a thousand faces. Yours is one. But not everyone believes that the God-Emperor can be worshipped in different ways."
languages.original_text: "У веры в Него тысяча ликов. Ваш таков. Просто не все считают, что Богу-Императору можно поклоняться по-разному".

traits.locale_text: "Faith in Him has a thousand faces. Yours is one. But not everyone believes that the God-Emperor can be worshipped in different ways."
"Faith in Him has a thousand faces. Yours is one. But not everyone believes that the God-Emperor can be worshipped in different ways."
"Faith in Him has a thousand faces. Yours is one. But not everyone believes that the God-Emperor can be worshipped in different ways."

languages.text: 「彼への信仰は千の顔を持つ。君のも一つ。しかし、神皇帝を異なる形で崇拝できるとは、誰もが思わない」
languages.original_text: "Faith in Him has a thousand faces. Yours is one. But not everyone believes that the God-Emperor can be worshipped in different ways."

languages.text: "O'na olan inancın bin farklı çehresi vardır. Seninki de bunlardan biri. Fakat herkes Tanrı İmparator'a farklı şekillerde ibadet edilebileceğine inanmaz."
languages.original_text: "Faith in Him has a thousand faces. Yours is one. But not everyone believes that the God-Emperor can be worshipped in different ways."

traits.locale_text: "O'na olan inancın bin farklı çehresi vardır. Seninki de bunlardan biri. Fakat herkes Tanrı İmparator'a farklı şekillerde ibadet edilebileceğine inanmaz."

languages.text: “对神皇的信仰有千万种形态，你们所持的仅是其一。但并非所有人都认为，人们可以用不同的方式来敬拜神皇。”
languages.original_text: "Faith in Him has a thousand faces. Yours is one. But not everyone believes that the God-Emperor can be worshipped in different ways."

traits.locale_text: “对神皇的信仰有千万种形态，你们所持的仅是其一。但并非所有人都认为，人们可以用不同的方式来敬拜神皇。”

languages.text: "Der Glaube an Ihn hat tausend Gesichter. Eures ist eines davon. Aber nicht jeder glaubt, dass der Gottimperator auf unterschiedliche Art und Weise verehrt werden kann."
languages.original_text: "Faith in Him has a thousand faces. Yours is one. But not everyone believes that the God-Emperor can be worshipped in different ways."

traits.locale_text: "Der Glaube an Ihn hat tausend Gesichter. Eures ist eines davon. Aber nicht jeder glaubt, dass der Gottimperator auf unterschiedliche Art und Weise verehrt werden kann."

languages.text: « La foi que vous avez en Lui n'est qu'un visage parmi des milliers d'autres. Mais il en est qui refusent de croire que l'Empereur-Dieu peut être vénéré de différentes manières. »
languages.original_text: "Faith in Him has a thousand faces. Yours is one. But not everyone believes that the God-Emperor can be worshipped in different ways."

traits.locale_text: « La foi que vous avez en Lui n'est qu'un visage parmi des milliers d'autres. Mais il en est qui refusent de croire que l'Empereur-Dieu peut être vénéré de différentes manières. »

languages.text: «La fe en el Dios Emperador tiene mil formas, incluyendo la suya, pero no todos creen que se le puede adorar de diferentes maneras».
languages.original_text: "Faith in Him has a thousand faces. Yours is one. But not everyone believes that the God-Emperor can be worshipped in different ways."

traits.locale_text: «La fe en el Dios Emperador tiene mil formas, incluyendo la suya, pero no todos creen que se le puede adorar de diferentes maneras».
